rulings.Case Title: DAVID RAYNOR ET AL VS. CRAIG LIPTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injuction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 07, 2020 line 1. PLAINTIFFS DAVID RAYNOR and ERIN DOLLY's Motion For Preliminary Injuction Continued to August 14, 2020 per stipulation and order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: O. LIOR NUCHI VS. CITIMORTGAGE, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: AMENDED MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 07, 2020 line 2. PLAINTIFF O. NUCHI's AMENDED MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD READ THIS NOTIFICATION IN ITS ENTIRETY. Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you appear in-person for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or a face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing moving and opposing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (note: prevailing party to prepare an order repeating the tentative ruling verbatim in addition to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Dept501Orders@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). All communications sent to the Court must be copied to the opposing party/counsel for whom e-mail addresses are known. The e-mail address provided herein shall only be used for the purposes indicated above. No unauthorized communications will be considered or responded to. Plaintiff's Motion for Withdrawal of Attorney of Record is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Counsel to prepare order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 274 BRANNAN STREET OWNER, LLC VS. FORTRESS SF1, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Jul 07, 2020 line 3. DEFENDANT FORTRESS SF1, LLC's, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT READ THIS NOTIFICATION IN ITS ENTIRETY. Due to COVID-19 pandemic telephonic appearances are encouraged. If you appear in-person for your case notify the department by 5:00 p.m. one day before the hearing at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org. Department will follow social distancing guidelines and you will be required to wear a mask or a face covering. By 8:00 a.m. on the date of the hearing moving and opposing parties to submit electronic copies of their respective proposed orders (note: prevailing party to prepare an order repeating the tentative ruling verbatim in addition to any other proposed orders) in an editable format to Dept501Orders@sftc.org, so that the judge can modify it prior to signing, if needed. All communications shall include in the subject line the case name, number and hearing date. (e.g. "Smith v. Jones; CGC-18-555555; June 1, 2020"). All communications sent to the Court must be copied to the opposing party/counsel for whom e-mail addresses are known. The e-mail address provided herein shall only be used for the purposes indicated above. No unauthorized communications will be considered or responded to. Defendant's Demurrer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Moving party failed to establish that there is another action pending between the same parties on the same causes of action. =(501/CFH)
